subcodes.first_line: O friends of Truth! Through the aid and favours of His Holiness the One God, I hope that His loved ones in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حق از عون و الطاف حضرت احدیت امیدوارم که احبای خویش را از جمیع احوال
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
